title: OpenAI Safety Research
description: Supporting research into artificial intelligence safety and alignment to ensure beneficial AI development.
longDescription: OpenAI's safety research focuses on developing AI systems that are aligned with human values and can be safely deployed at scale. This includes research into interpretability, robustness, and value alignment.
achievements: Published breakthrough papers on AI interpretability

title: Effective Altruism Global Health
description: Contributing to evidence-based interventions that improve global health outcomes in developing countries.
longDescription: Supporting cost-effective global health interventions that save and improve lives in the world's poorest countries. Focus on interventions with strong evidence base and high impact per dollar.
goals: Improve maternal and child health outcomes
Strengthen healthcare systems in developing countries

title: Climate Research Initiative
description: Funding climate science research and carbon removal technologies to address global warming.
longDescription: Supporting cutting-edge research into climate solutions including direct air capture, renewable energy optimization, and climate modeling to accelerate the transition to a sustainable future.
achievements: Supported development of new climate models

title: Education Access Foundation
description: Providing educational resources and scholarships to underserved communities worldwide.
longDescription: Dedicated to breaking down barriers to quality education by providing scholarships, educational materials, and infrastructure support to communities that need it most.
goals: Increase literacy rates in developing regions

title: Mental Health Research Consortium
description: Supporting innovative research into mental health treatments and suicide prevention programs.
longDescription: Funding research into novel mental health treatments, particularly focusing on depression, anxiety, and suicide prevention to improve mental healthcare accessibility and effectiveness.
achievements: Funded 2 clinical trials for new treatments

title: Animal Welfare Alliance
description: Supporting humane treatment of animals and ending factory farming practices.
longDescription: Working to improve conditions for farm animals, promote humane treatment, and transition to more sustainable and ethical food production systems.

title: Digital Privacy Foundation
description: Protecting digital privacy rights and promoting data security for individuals worldwide.
longDescription: Advocating for strong digital privacy protections, supporting encryption research, and educating the public about data security and privacy rights.
